channel.title: LCallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from LCallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Dems dig in, guarantee shutdown with block of DHS funding
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune, R-S.D., charged that Senate Democrats weren't interested in a solution to the DHS, but rather wanted to turn it int...

item.title: Federal judge upholds temporary protected status for Haitian immigrants
item.description: A federal judge upheld temporary protected status for Haitian immigrants in the United States and quoted death threats she's received, during a Thursd...

item.title: US lawmakers warn Taiwan to ‘meet the moment’ as China stages invasion-style drills
item.description: Bipartisan U.S. lawmakers warn Taiwan's political gridlock over defense spending could undermine deterrence as China escalates military pressure.

item.title: Federal judge blocks Trump's bid to move Biden-commuted death row inmates to ‘Alcatraz of the Rockies’
item.description: A judge who blocked the Trump administration from transferring former death row inmates said the criminals were convicted of "some of the most horrifi...

item.title: Trump Kneecaps EPA With 'Largest Deregulatory Action in American History'
'You Should Be in Jail': Josh Hawley Lights Up MN AG Ellison in Wild Exchange About Fraud Scandal
Poll: 58 Percent Say Democrats Too Radical As 'Very Liberal' Wing Quadruples Since 1999
Hawley clashes with Minnesota AG Ellison over fraud: ‘You ought to be indicted’
item.description: Sen. Josh Hawley accuses Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison of helping fraudsters in the Feeding Our Future case and accepting $10,000 in donati...

item.title: Another Sad Immigration Story Gives a Gullible Media the Wile E. Coyote Treatment
'Horsefeathers!': Judge Steps in, Freezing Pentagon Move Against Sen. Kelly Over Military Speech
